name: Baby Jean
description: '''Baby Jean''' (born '''Habish Rahman''') is an Indian [[rapper]], [[Singing|singer]], [[songwriter]] and [[actor]] from [[Kerala]]. He is associated with the [[Malayalam hip-hop]] scene and gained popularity with songs such as "Kaayi". He has been recognized as one of the emerging names in Malayalam rap by publications such as ''[[The Indian Express]]'', ''[[Onmanorama]]'' and ''Rolling Stone India''. He made his acting debut in the 2025 Malayalam film ''[[Alappuzha Gymkhana]]''.
